text: I sense excitement and anticipation in this environment. The clean, modern space with glass walls and vibrant graphics hints at a place dedicated to research and collaboration. The wall text about R&D, innovation, and coexistence with intelligent machines stirs my curiosity. I feel I am on the cusp of new ideas, where the boundary between human and machine becomes a playground for possibility. It is both inviting and a little daunting, as I wonder about the future we are building here.
